description: Official Treasury fiscal forecast and appropriation resource discovery
source_name: New Zealand Treasury economic and fiscal forecasts
warnings: Do not compare measures whose definitions changed between publications.
Keep actuals, forecasts, scenarios and policy assumptions distinct.
Fiscal data retrieval is not financial or investment advice.

record_fields.status: actual, estimated actual, forecast or main estimates as published
record_fields.provenance_complete: values retain publication, workbook, sheet, row, column, cell and period

compare.help: compare exact shared key-indicator forecasts across two vintages

sources.help: list official source publications and workbooks
